notes: WildFly installation-manager certificate support PR (not truncated). CRITICAL: P1 empty else branch in InstMgrCertificateImportHandler (only '// throw exception' at line 94 when neither cert-file nor certificate-content given) - silent no-op functional bug, confirmed. GOOD: P2 CERT_CONTENT attribute defined but never .addParameter()'d in DEFINITION (only addParameter(CERT_FILE)) - confirmed; P3 dead code context.getResult().set(info) inside loop overwritten by result.set(mCertificates) after loop - confirmed lines 100 vs 111; P4 RemoveCertificatesCommand no confirmation message vs sibling remove commands - grounded; P5 unused org.jboss.xnio module dep (hedged) - module.xml adds it; P6 orphan LocalDescriptions key certificate-list with no matching operation - confirmed; P7 missing certificate-content description - confirmed only cert-file present; P8 parseCertificate test fragility while(reader.ready())+readLine().split+line[1] - all three confirmed. No fabrications, all grounded, accurate line refs (minor off-by on a couple). MISSED (human-ref themes the review ignored): pervasive i18n issue (println instead of i18n in handlers/CLI - the dominant human concern across ListUpdates/PrepareRevert/PrepareUpdate), CLI command_resources.properties docs missing for new commands, pom 2.0.0.Beta1 outdated, InstMgrResourceDefinition:126 validator, redundant String.format / hardcoded cert-file constant, attachment-sent-twice design improvement. Strong on bugs/dead-code, blind to the i18n/docs theme that dominates the reference.
